1940	theorem sectionCech_homology_exact {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R)
1941	    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R) (hs : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤)
1942	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
1943	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
1944	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
1945	  obtain ⟨q, rfl⟩ : ∃ q, p = q + 1 := ⟨p - 1, by omega⟩
1946	  exact sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact _ _ q (sectionCechAbExact M s hs q)
1947	
1948	/-- **Standard-cover {\v C}ech vanishing on affines, section form** (`lem:cech_acyclic_affine`,
1949	section form).  For a spanning family `s : ι → R` and the tilde sheaf `~M` of an `R`-module
1950	`M`, the section {\v C}ech complex of the associated standard affine cover has vanishing
1951	cohomology in all positive degrees.  This is the named affine-vanishing target; the general
1952	quasi-coherent `F` is reduced to this tilde case via `F ≅ ~(ΓF)` (Stacks 01I8, deferred). -/
1953	theorem sectionCech_affine_vanishing {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R)
1954	    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R) (hs : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤)
1955	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
1956	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
1957	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) :=
1958	  sectionCech_homology_exact M s hs p hp
1959	
1960	/-- **Standard *sub*cover {\v C}ech vanishing for the tilde sheaf — the route-B residual**
1961	(`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`, Stacks 02KG via
1962	`lemma-cech-cohomology-quasi-coherent-trivial`).  Let `s : ι → R` be a finite family with
1963	`D(f) = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)` (so `{sᵢ}` covers the basic open `D(f)`, spanning only `√(f)`, NOT necessarily
1964	the unit ideal of `R`).  Then the section {\v C}ech complex of `~M` over `{D(sᵢ)}` has vanishing
1965	homology in all positive degrees.
1966	
1967	This is the residual `htilde` of the 02KG cone: the cover is of a *proper* `D(f)`, so it is proved
1968	by change of base to `R_f = Localization.Away f` (where `{sᵢ/1}` does span the unit ideal),
1969	through `sectionCechAbExact_loc` (which feeds the change-of-ring exactness
1970	`SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway` into the tilde-bridge ladder).  The covering
1971	hypothesis `hcov` supplies both the `R_f`-spanning datum (mirroring
1972	`affine_cover_span_localizationAway`) and the radical membership `sᵢ ∈ √(f)`. -/
1973	theorem sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R)
1974	    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R) (f : R)
1975	    (hcov : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f : (Spec R).Opens)
1976	      = ⨆ i, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
1977	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
1978	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
1979	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
1980	  -- each `sᵢ` lies in `√(f)` since `D(sᵢ) ⊆ D(f)`.
1981	  have hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k := by
1982	    intro i
1983	    have hle : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i) : (Spec R).Opens) ≤ PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen f := by
1984	      rw [hcov]; exact le_iSup (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i)) i
1985	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen_le_basicOpen_iff (s i) f).mp hle
1986	    exact ⟨k, Ideal.mem_span_singleton.mp hk⟩
1987	  -- `{sᵢ/1}` spans the unit ideal of `R_f` (mirror of `affine_cover_span_localizationAway`).
1988	  have hspan : Ideal.span
1989	      (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤ := by
1990	    rw [← PrimeSpectrum.iSup_basicOpen_eq_top_iff]
1991	    simp only [← PrimeSpectrum.comap_basicOpen]
1992	    rw [← map_iSup, ← hcov, PrimeSpectrum.comap_basicOpen, eq_top_iff]
1993	    rintro q -
1994	    rw [PrimeSpectrum.mem_basicOpen]
1995	    exact fun hu => q.isPrime.ne_top
1996	      (Ideal.eq_top_of_isUnit_mem _ hu (IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit f))
1997	  obtain ⟨q, rfl⟩ : ∃ q, p = q + 1 := ⟨p - 1, by omega⟩
1998	  exact sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact _ _ q (sectionCechAbExact_loc M s f hmem hspan q)
1999	
2000	/-- **Cover of a general affine open: {\v C}ech vanishing for the tilde sheaf — change-of-base form**
2001	(`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_general_seed`, Stacks 02KG over an arbitrary affine open).  For a finite
2002	family `s : ι → R` whose distinguished opens `D(sᵢ)` cover a *general affine open* `V = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)` of
2003	`Spec R` (not necessarily a single `D(f)`), the positive-degree section {\v C}ech cohomology of the
2004	tilde sheaf `~M` over `{D(sᵢ)}` vanishes — provided the change-of-base certificate `(S, hspan, hloc)`:
2005	an `R`-algebra `S` (in practice `S = Γ(V, 𝒪)`) in which the images `sᵢ ↦ S` span the unit ideal
2006	(`hspan`), together with the per-{\v C}ech-multi-index localisation datum `hloc` (encoding `D(s_σ) ⊆ V`,
2007	so that the `S`-localisation `(M⊗_R S)_{s̄_σ}` is an `R`-localisation of `M` at `powers (s_σ)`).
2008	
2009	This is the route-B1 analogue of `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_localizationAway`: the `D(f)` case takes
2010	`S = Localization.Away f`, where `hspan` is `affine_cover_span_localizationAway` and `hloc` is automatic
2011	(`Localization.Away` of an `R`-element is already an `R`-localisation); the general affine `V` needs the
2012	genuine `S = Γ(V)` and the geometric `hloc`.  Both are discharged at the call site from `IsAffineOpen V`
2013	via `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen`. -/
2014	theorem sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineCover {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R)
2015	    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R)
2016	    (S : Type u) [CommRing S] [Algebra R S]
2017	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R S (s i))) = ⊤)
2018	    (hloc : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
2019	      IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (CechLocalized.sprod s σ))
2020	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (CechLocalized.sprod s σ)))))
2021	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
2022	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
2023	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
2024	  obtain ⟨q, rfl⟩ : ∃ q, p = q + 1 := ⟨p - 1, by omega⟩
2025	  exact sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact _ _ q
2026	    (sectionCechAbExact_affine M s S hspan hloc q)
2027	
2028	end AlgebraicGeometry

2030	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — general-affine-open seed (geometric assembly)
2031	
2032	The final geometric wrapper `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineOpen` discharges the change-of-base
2033	data `(S, hspan, hloc)` of `sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineCover` from `IsAffineOpen V`, with
2034	`S := Γ(V, 𝒪)`.  The section-restriction algebra `Algebra Γ(V) Γ(D a)` is NOT a synthesizable instance
2035	(it depends on the inclusion `D a ⟶ V`); it is provided explicitly as the `.toAlgebra` of the
2036	restriction map — the same one `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen` constructs — and the
2037	scalar tower `R → Γ(V) → Γ(D a)` is `rfl`-definitional. -/
2038	
2039	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
2040	
2041	open AlgebraicTopology Scheme.Modules
2042	
2043	/-- **Basic open of a restricted global section** (geometric brick for the general-affine seed).  For
2044	the affine scheme `Spec R`, an open `V`, and `a : R`, the basic open of the restriction
2045	`algebraMap R Γ(V) a` of the global section `a` to `V` is `V ⊓ D(a)`.  The restriction factors through
2046	`Γ(⊤)` *definitionally* (`algebraMap R Γ(V) a = (Spec R).presheaf.map _ (algebraMap R Γ(⊤) a)`, `rfl`),
2047	so `Scheme.basicOpen_res` gives `V ⊓ (Spec R).basicOpen (a : Γ(⊤))` and `basicOpen_eq_of_affine`
2048	identifies `(Spec R).basicOpen (a : Γ(⊤)) = D(a)`.  (Avoids the `Algebra Γ(⊤) Γ(V)` scoped instance,
2049	which is shadowed in this file's open-context.)  Project-local: supplies both the spanning datum
2050	`hspan` and the per-`σ` localisation datum `hloc` of the change-of-base seed. -/
2051	private lemma basicOpen_algMap_section {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (V : (Spec R).Opens) (a : ↥R) :
2052	    (Spec R).basicOpen (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a)
2053	    = V ⊓ PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a := by
2054	  have key : (Spec R).basicOpen (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ⊤)) a)
2055	      = PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a := basicOpen_eq_of_affine a
2056	  rw [show algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a
2057	        = ConcreteCategory.hom ((Spec R).presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_top : V ≤ ⊤)).op)
2058	            (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op ⊤)) a) from rfl,
2059	      (Spec R).basicOpen_res, key]
2060	
2061	/-- **Cover of a general affine open: {\v C}ech vanishing for the tilde sheaf** (Stacks 02KG,
2062	`lemma-cech-cohomology-quasi-coherent-trivial`, generalised from `D(f)` to an arbitrary affine open).
2063	Let `s : ι → R` be a finite family whose distinguished opens `D(sᵢ)` cover an **affine** open
2064	`V = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)` of `Spec R` (`hV : IsAffineOpen V`; `V` need NOT be a single `D(f)`).  Then the section
2065	{\v C}ech complex of the tilde sheaf `~M` over `{D(sᵢ)}` has vanishing homology in all positive degrees.
2066	
2067	This is the residual `htilde` of the enlarged (general-affine) 02KG cone — the seed
2068	`affine_cech_vanishing_qcoh_general_of_tildeVanishing` consumes exactly this shape.  Discharged by
2069	`sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineCover` with `S := Γ(V)`: the spanning datum `hspan` is
2070	`IsAffineOpen.iSup_basicOpen_eq_self_iff` (the `D(sᵢ)` cover `V`), and the per-{\v C}ech-multi-index
2071	localisation datum `hloc` comes from `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen` (each `D(s_σ) ⊆ V`)
2072	transported across the `R`-algebra iso `Γ(D(s_σ)) ≃ₐ[R] Localization (powers (s̄_σ))`. -/
2073	theorem sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineOpen {R : CommRingCat.{u}} (M : ModuleCat.{u} R)
2074	    {ι : Type u} [Finite ι] (s : ι → R)
2075	    (hV : IsAffineOpen (X := Spec R) (⨆ i, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i)))
2076	    (p : ℕ) (hp : 1 ≤ p) :
2077	    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i))
2078	      ((Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj (tilde M))).homology p) := by
2079	  set V := (⨆ i, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i) : (Spec R).Opens) with hVdef
2080	  -- the restricted family `s̄ᵢ = algebraMap R Γ(V) sᵢ` spans the unit ideal of `S = Γ(V)`.
2081	  have hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range
2082	      (fun i => algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) (s i))) = ⊤ := by
2083	    rw [← hV.iSup_basicOpen_eq_self_iff, iSup_range']
2084	    simp_rw [basicOpen_algMap_section V]
2085	    rw [← inf_iSup_eq, ← hVdef, inf_idem]
2086	  -- per Čech multi-index `σ`: the `S`-localisation at `s̄_σ` is an `R`-localisation at `powers (s_σ)`.
2087	  have hloc : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
2088	      IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (CechLocalized.sprod s σ))
2089	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap ↥R
2090	          ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) (CechLocalized.sprod s σ)))) := by
2091	    intro n σ
2092	    have hDaV : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (CechLocalized.sprod s σ) : (Spec R).Opens) ≤ V := by
2093	      have hsp : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (CechLocalized.sprod s σ) : (Spec R).Opens)
2094	          = ⨅ k, PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s (σ k)) := (basicOpen_sprod (n + 1) s σ).symm
2095	      rw [hsp]
2096	      exact le_trans (iInf_le _ 0) (le_iSup (fun i => PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen (s i)) (σ 0))
2097	    set a := CechLocalized.sprod s σ with ha
2098	    have e : (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a : (Spec R).Opens)
2099	        = (Spec R).basicOpen (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a) := by
2100	      rw [basicOpen_algMap_section V a]; exact (inf_of_le_right hDaV).symm
2101	    -- pin the section-restriction algebra `Γ(V) → Γ(D a)` (the ad-hoc `.toAlgebra` that
2102	    -- `isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen` constructs from the inclusion `D a ⟶ V`) so the algEquiv
2103	    -- and `restrictScalars` below resolve it consistently.
2104	    letI algVDa : Algebra ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V))
2105	        ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a))) :=
2106	      ((Spec R).presheaf.map (homOfLE hDaV).op).hom.toAlgebra
2107	    haveI towerRVDa : IsScalarTower ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V))
2108	        ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a))) :=
2109	      IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq (fun _ => rfl)
2110	    haveI hS : IsLocalization.Away
2111	        (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a)
2112	        ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a))) :=
2113	      hV.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen
2114	        (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a) (homOfLE hDaV) e
2115	    let eAlg : ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (PrimeSpectrum.basicOpen a)))
2116	        ≃ₐ[↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V))]
2117	          Localization (Submonoid.powers
2118	            (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a)) :=
2119	      IsLocalization.algEquiv (Submonoid.powers
2120	        (algebraMap ↥R ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) a)) _ _
2121	    exact IsLocalization.isLocalization_of_algEquiv (Submonoid.powers a) (eAlg.restrictScalars ↥R)
2122	  exact sectionCech_homology_exact_of_affineCover M s
2123	    ↥((Spec R).presheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)) hspan hloc p hp
2124	
2125	end AlgebraicGeometry

587	variable {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {ι : Type*} (s : ι → R)
588	
589	/-- `s_σ = ∏ₖ s (σ k)`, the localising element for the multi-index `σ`. -/
590	def sprod {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : R := ∏ k, s (σ k)
591	
592	@[simp] lemma sprod_cons {m : ℕ} (i : ι) (σ : Fin m → ι) :
593	    sprod s (Fin.cons i σ) = s i * sprod s σ := by
594	  simp [sprod, Fin.prod_univ_succ]
595	
596	/-- A coface (index deletion) only drops the factor `s (σ j)`, so the smaller
597	product divides the larger: `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`.  This supplies the `Inverts`
598	hypothesis for the coface comparison `δ`. -/
599	lemma sprod_succAbove_dvd {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
600	    sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∣ sprod s σ := by
601	  have h : sprod s σ = s (σ j) * sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove) := by
602	    rw [sprod, sprod, Fin.prod_univ_succAbove _ j]; rfl
603	  exact ⟨s (σ j), by rw [h]; ring⟩
604	
605	/-! ### The localised coefficient family and the concrete `δ`/`c` maps
606	
607	After localising the whole section {\v C}ech complex at a spanning element `s r`,
608	its degree-`p` coefficient at the multi-index `σ` is `M` localised at the product
609	`s r · s_σ` (the away localisation at `s_σ`, further localised at `s r`).  We model
610	that double localisation by the single away localisation at `s r · s_σ`.  The coface
611	`δ` and prepend `c` maps are the away-comparison maps of `AwayComparison`; the
612	`Inverts` hypotheses come from `sprod_succAbove_dvd` (for `δ`) and from
613	`Inverts.mul` together with `sprod_cons` (for `c`). -/
614	
615	variable (M : Type u) [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M] (r : ι)
616	
617	/-- The localised {\v C}ech coefficient `A_σ = M_{s r · s_σ}` (after localising at the
618	fixed index `r`). -/
619	abbrev cechCoeff {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : Type u :=
620	  LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M
621	
622	/-- The coface comparison `δ : A_{σ∘dⱼ} → A_σ`, the canonical localisation map for the
623	divisibility `s r · s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s r · s_σ`. -/
624	noncomputable def cechCoface (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
625	    cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →+ cechCoeff s M r σ :=
626	  (AwayComparison.comparison (M := M)
627	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
628	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
629	    (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j))
630	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))).toAddMonoidHom
631	
632	/-- The prepend comparison `c : A_{cons r σ} → A_σ`, the canonical localisation map.
633	Its source localises at `s r · s_{cons r σ} = s r · (s r · s_σ)`, a product whose
634	factors are all invertible in `A_σ`, supplied by `Inverts.mul`. -/
635	noncomputable def cechPrepend (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin m → ι) :
636	    cechCoeff s M r (Fin.cons r σ) →+ cechCoeff s M r σ :=
637	  (AwayComparison.comparison (M := M)
638	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s (Fin.cons r σ))) M)
639	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
640	    (by
641	      change AwayComparison.Inverts (s r * sprod s (Fin.cons r σ))
642	        (LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
643	      have h : s r * sprod s (Fin.cons r σ) = s r * (s r * sprod s σ) := by
644	        rw [sprod_cons]
645	      rw [h]
646	      exact AwayComparison.Inverts.mul
647	        (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd ⟨sprod s σ, rfl⟩
648	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
649	        (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd dvd_rfl
650	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)))).toAddMonoidHom
651	
652	/-- A transport of a {\v C}ech coefficient along an equality of multi-index tuples
653	`τ₁ = τ₂` is the canonical comparison map (both localise `M` at the *same* element
654	`s r · s_τ`, since `s_τ` depends only on the function `τ`). This is the bridge
655	between the dependent-type transports `▸` of the combinatorial core and the
656	away-comparison maps. -/
657	lemma cechCoeff_transport_eq_comparison {m : ℕ} {τ₁ τ₂ : Fin m → ι} (hτ : τ₁ = τ₂)
658	    (hinv : AwayComparison.Inverts (s r * sprod s τ₁) (cechCoeff s M r τ₂))
659	    (y : cechCoeff s M r τ₁) :
660	    hτ ▸ y = AwayComparison.comparison
661	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s τ₁)) M)
662	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s τ₂)) M) hinv y := by
663	  subst hτ
664	  rw [AwayComparison.comparison_self]
665	  rfl
666	
667	/-- **Unit compatibility** `hu` for the concrete localised {\v C}ech maps:
668	`c ∘ δ₀ = transport`.  Deleting the prepended `r` (the `0`-th coface) and then
669	applying the prepend `c` is, on the away localisations, the identity transport,
670	because all three maps are away-comparison maps and compose by `comparison_comp`. -/
671	lemma cech_hu {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι)
672	    (y : cechCoeff s M r ((Fin.cons r σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) ∘ (0 : Fin (m + 2)).succAbove)) :
673	    cechPrepend s M r (m + 1) σ (cechCoface s M r (m + 1) (Fin.cons r σ) 0 y)
674	      = (CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_zero_succAbove r σ) ▸ y := by
675	  have heq : (Fin.cons r σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) ∘ (0 : Fin (m + 2)).succAbove = σ :=
676	    CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_zero_succAbove r σ
677	  have hinv : AwayComparison.Inverts
678	      (s r * sprod s ((Fin.cons r σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) ∘ (0 : Fin (m + 2)).succAbove))
679	      (cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
680	    AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_of_eq (by rw [heq])) (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M)
681	  simp only [cechPrepend, cechCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
682	  change _ = heq ▸ y
683	  rw [cechCoeff_transport_eq_comparison s M r heq hinv,
684	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply]
685	
686	/-- **Shift compatibility** `hsh` for the concrete localised {\v C}ech maps:
687	`c ∘ δ_{k+1} = δ_k ∘ c` (modulo the index transport).  Both composites are
688	away-comparison maps from the same source localisation to the same target, hence
689	equal — assembled from `comparison_comp` and the transport bridge. -/
690	lemma cech_hsh {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (k : Fin (m + 1))
691	    (y : cechCoeff s M r ((Fin.cons r σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) ∘ (k.succ).succAbove)) :
692	    cechPrepend s M r (m + 1) σ (cechCoface s M r (m + 1) (Fin.cons r σ) k.succ y)
693	      = cechCoface s M r m σ k
694	          (cechPrepend s M r m (σ ∘ k.succAbove)
695	            ((CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_succAbove_succ r σ k) ▸ y)) := by
696	  have heq' : (Fin.cons r σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) ∘ (k.succ).succAbove
697	      = Fin.cons r (σ ∘ k.succAbove) := CombinatorialCech.cons_comp_succAbove_succ r σ k
698	  have hinv' : AwayComparison.Inverts
699	      (s r * sprod s ((Fin.cons r σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) ∘ (k.succ).succAbove))
700	      (cechCoeff s M r (Fin.cons r (σ ∘ k.succAbove))) :=
701	    AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_of_eq (by rw [heq'])) (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M)
702	  have key : AwayComparison.Inverts (s r * sprod s (Fin.cons r (σ ∘ k.succAbove)))
703	      (cechCoeff s M r σ) := by
704	    rw [show s r * sprod s (Fin.cons r (σ ∘ k.succAbove))
705	          = s r * (s r * sprod s (σ ∘ k.succAbove)) from by rw [sprod_cons]]
706	    exact AwayComparison.Inverts.mul
707	      (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_mul_right (s r) (sprod s σ))
708	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M))
709	      (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ k))
710	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M))
711	  simp only [cechPrepend, cechCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
712	  rw [cechCoeff_transport_eq_comparison s M r heq' hinv',
713	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply, AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply,
714	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply]
715	  · rw [heq']; exact key
716	  · exact key
717	
718	/-- **Coface commutation** `hcomm` (the `d² = 0` swap identity) for the concrete
719	localised {\v C}ech maps.  Both bracketings of the double coface are away-comparison
720	maps from the (swap-invariant) double-deletion localisation to `A_σ`, hence equal. -/
721	lemma cech_hcomm {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 2)) (i : Fin (m + 1))
722	    (z : cechCoeff s M r ((σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∘ i.succAbove)) :
723	    cechCoface s M r (m + 1) σ j (cechCoface s M r m (σ ∘ j.succAbove) i z)
724	      = cechCoface s M r (m + 1) σ (j.succAbove i)
725	          (cechCoface s M r m (σ ∘ (j.succAbove i).succAbove) (i.predAbove j)
726	            ((CombinatorialCech.comp_succAbove_swap σ j i).symm ▸ z)) := by
727	  have heqc : (σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∘ i.succAbove
728	      = (σ ∘ (j.succAbove i).succAbove) ∘ (i.predAbove j).succAbove :=
729	    (CombinatorialCech.comp_succAbove_swap σ j i).symm
730	  have hinvc : AwayComparison.Inverts (s r * sprod s ((σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∘ i.succAbove))
731	      (cechCoeff s M r ((σ ∘ (j.succAbove i).succAbove) ∘ (i.predAbove j).succAbove)) :=
732	    AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_of_eq (by rw [heqc])) (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M)
733	  have key : AwayComparison.Inverts (s r * sprod s ((σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∘ i.succAbove))
734	      (cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
735	    AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd
736	      (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r)
737	        (dvd_trans (sprod_succAbove_dvd s (σ ∘ j.succAbove) i) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)))
738	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap _ M)
739	  simp only [cechCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
740	  rw [cechCoeff_transport_eq_comparison s M r heqc hinvc,
741	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply, AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply,
742	    AwayComparison.comparison_comp_apply]
743	  · exact key
744	  · rw [CombinatorialCech.comp_succAbove_swap]; exact key
745	
746	/-- **Positive-degree exactness of the localised section {\v C}ech complex.**
747	After localising the standard-cover section {\v C}ech complex at a spanning element
748	`s r`, the resulting complex of away-localisations `A_σ = M_{s r · s_σ}` is exact in
749	positive degrees.  This is the dependent combinatorial core
750	`CombinatorialCech.depDiff_exact` fed the concrete coface `cechCoface`, prepend
751	`cechPrepend`, and the compatibilities `cech_hu`/`cech_hsh`/`cech_hcomm`.  It is the
752	`Function.Exact` input that `exact_of_isLocalized_span` consumes node by node in the
753	L1 categorical→module bridge (the remaining gaps: the finite-product localisation
754	`∏_σ M_{s_σ}` and the sheaf-section identification `F(D(s_σ)) = M_{s_σ}`). -/
755	lemma cechLocalized_exact (m : ℕ) :
756	    Function.Exact
757	      (CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r)
758	        (m := m + 1))
759	      (CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r)
760	        (m := m + 2)) :=
761	  CombinatorialCech.depDiff_exact (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) r
762	    (cechCoface s M r) (cechPrepend s M r)
763	    (cech_hu s M r) (cech_hsh s M r) (cech_hcomm s M r) m
764	
765	end CechLocalized
766	
767	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — composite away-localisation (route B, change-of-ring)
768	
769	The route-B change-of-ring transfer (`lem:away_comparison_isLocalizedModule`, used by
770	`dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway`) needs the elementary fact that *localising twice*
771	— first `M ⇝ M_f` at `powers f`, then `M_f ⇝ N` at `powers (algebraMap R R_f a)` over the
772	localisation ring `R_f` — presents `N` as the single away localisation `M_a`, provided `f` is
773	already inverted once `a` is (`a^j = f·h`, i.e. `f ∈ √(a)`).  This is the module analogue of
774	`Localization.Away f` then `Localization.Away a = Localization.Away a` when `f ∣ aⁿ`. -/
775	
776	namespace AwayComparison
777	
778	/-- **Composite of two away localisations is an away localisation.**  See the section
779	docstring.  The `R`-linear composite `gN ∘ mkf : M → N` exhibits `N` as `M` localised at
780	`Submonoid.powers a`, given `a^j = f * h` (so `f` divides a power of `a`). -/
781	lemma isLocalizedModule_comp_away
782	    {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u} [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
783	    {Rf : Type u} [CommRing Rf] [Algebra R Rf]
784	    {Mf : Type u} [AddCommGroup Mf] [Module R Mf] [Module Rf Mf] [IsScalarTower R Rf Mf]
785	    {N : Type u} [AddCommGroup N] [Module R N] [Module Rf N] [IsScalarTower R Rf N]
786	    (f a h : R) {j : ℕ} (hfa : a ^ j = f * h)
787	    (mkf : M →ₗ[R] Mf) [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) mkf]
788	    (gN : Mf →ₗ[Rf] N) [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf a)) gN] :
789	    IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) ((gN.restrictScalars R) ∘ₗ mkf) := by
790	  have smulN : ∀ (r : R) (y : N), r • y = (algebraMap R Rf r) • y :=
791	    fun r y => (IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul Rf r y).symm
792	  have smulMf : ∀ (r : R) (y : Mf), r • y = (algebraMap R Rf r) • y :=
793	    fun r y => (IsScalarTower.algebraMap_smul Rf r y).symm
794	  -- `a^j = f h` lifts to `a^{j n} = f^n h^n`
795	  have hfa' : ∀ n : ℕ, a ^ (j * n) = f ^ n * h ^ n := fun n => by
796	    rw [pow_mul, hfa, mul_pow]
797	  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
798	  · -- map_units: `a` acts invertibly on `N` (as `algebraMap R Rf a` does)
799	    rintro ⟨x, n, rfl⟩
800	    rw [Module.End.isUnit_iff]
801	    have hb : Function.Bijective
802	        (⇑(algebraMap Rf (Module.End Rf N) ((algebraMap R Rf a) ^ n))) :=
803	      (Module.End.isUnit_iff _).1 (by
804	        rw [map_pow]
805	        exact (IsLocalizedModule.map_units gN
806	          ⟨algebraMap R Rf a, Submonoid.mem_powers _⟩).pow n)
807	    have hfun : ⇑(algebraMap R (Module.End R N) (a ^ n))
808	        = ⇑(algebraMap Rf (Module.End Rf N) ((algebraMap R Rf a) ^ n)) := by
809	      funext y
810	      simp only [Module.algebraMap_end_eq_smul_id, LinearMap.smul_apply, LinearMap.id_apply]
811	      rw [smulN, map_pow]
812	    rw [hfun]; exact hb
813	  · -- surjectivity
814	    intro y
815	    obtain ⟨⟨mf, u⟩, hu⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.surj (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf a)) gN y
816	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := u.2
817	    obtain ⟨⟨m0, v⟩, hv⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.surj (Submonoid.powers f) mkf mf
818	    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := v.2
819	    simp only [] at hk hl
820	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def] at hu hv
821	    dsimp only at hu hv
822	    have hay : (a ^ k : R) • y = gN mf := by
823	      rw [smulN, map_pow, hk]; exact hu
824	    have hfm : (f ^ l : R) • mf = mkf m0 := by rw [hl]; exact hv
825	    refine ⟨⟨h ^ l • m0, ⟨a ^ (j * l + k), j * l + k, rfl⟩⟩, ?_⟩
826	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def]
827	    change (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • y = gN (mkf (h ^ l • m0))
828	    have lhs : (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • y = (f ^ l * h ^ l) • gN mf := by
829	      rw [pow_add, hfa' l, mul_smul, hay]
830	    have rhs : gN (mkf (h ^ l • m0)) = (h ^ l * f ^ l) • gN mf := by
831	      rw [_root_.map_smul, ← hfm, LinearMap.map_smul_of_tower,
832	        LinearMap.map_smul_of_tower, ← mul_smul]
833	    rw [lhs, rhs, mul_comm (f ^ l) (h ^ l)]
834	  · -- exists_of_eq
835	    intro x1 x2 hx
836	    simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply] at hx
837	    obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.exists_of_eq
838	      (S := Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf a)) (f := gN) hx
839	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := u.2
840	    simp only [] at hk
841	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def] at hu
842	    have h1 : mkf ((a ^ k : R) • x1) = mkf ((a ^ k : R) • x2) := by
843	      rw [_root_.map_smul, _root_.map_smul]
844	      simp only [smulMf, map_pow, hk]
845	      exact hu
846	    obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := IsLocalizedModule.exists_of_eq (S := Submonoid.powers f) (f := mkf) h1
847	    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := w.2
848	    simp only [] at hl
849	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def] at hw
850	    have h2 : (f ^ l : R) • (a ^ k : R) • x1 = (f ^ l : R) • (a ^ k : R) • x2 := by
851	      rw [hl]; exact hw
852	    refine ⟨⟨a ^ (j * l + k), j * l + k, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
853	    rw [Submonoid.smul_def]
854	    change (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • x1 = (a ^ (j * l + k) : R) • x2
855	    have hexp : a ^ (j * l + k) = h ^ l * (f ^ l * a ^ k) := by
856	      rw [pow_add, hfa' l]; ring
857	    simp only [hexp, mul_smul]
858	    rw [h2]
859	
860	end AwayComparison
861	
862	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — base-change composite localisation (route B1, change-of-ring)
863	
864	The general-affine-open seed (Stacks 02KG over an arbitrary affine `V = ⨆ᵢ D(gᵢ)`, NOT a single
865	`D(f)`) is proved by change of base to `S = Γ(V)`, where the cover family `ḡᵢ = algebraMap R S gᵢ`
866	DOES span the unit ideal.  The transport back to `R` needs, per Čech multi-index `σ`, the fact that
867	the composite `M → M ⊗_R S → (M ⊗_R S)_{ḡσ}` (base change to `S`, then localise at `ḡσ`) presents the
868	localised tensor as the localisation `M_{gσ}` of `M` at `powers gσ` over `R`.  This is the algebraic
869	analogue of `AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away`, but with the FIRST leg a base change
870	(`IsBaseChange S`) rather than a localisation: `M → M_S` is not a localisation of `M` (S is not a
871	localisation of `R`).  The single geometric input — that the localised ring is simultaneously an
872	`R`-localisation at `powers gσ` — is supplied as the instance `[IsLocalization (powers a) Aloc]`. -/
873	
874	/-- **Base-change composite is a localisation.**  Let `bc : M →ₗ[R] MS` exhibit `MS` as the base
875	change of `M` to an `R`-algebra `S` (`IsBaseChange S bc`), and let `gN : MS →ₗ[S] N` localise `MS`
876	at `powers (algebraMap R S a)` over `S`, with localised ring `Aloc`.  If `Aloc` is moreover an
877	`R`-localisation at `powers a` (the geometric input, encoding `D(a) ⊆ Spec S` when `S = Γ(V)`), then
878	the `R`-linear composite `gN ∘ bc : M →ₗ[R] N` exhibits `N` as the localisation of `M` at `powers a`.
879	
880	Pure base-change algebra: `IsBaseChange` is transitive (`IsBaseChange.comp`), and
881	`isLocalizedModule_iff_isBaseChange` converts both directions.  This is the route-B1 replacement for
882	`AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` in the general-affine `dDiff_exact_of_affineCover`. -/
883	theorem isLocalizedModule_baseChange_away
884	    {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {M : Type u} [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
885	    {S : Type u} [CommRing S] [Algebra R S]
886	    {MS : Type u} [AddCommGroup MS] [Module R MS] [Module S MS] [IsScalarTower R S MS]
887	    (bc : M →ₗ[R] MS) (hbc : IsBaseChange S bc)
888	    {a : R}
889	    {N : Type u} [AddCommGroup N] [Module R N] [Module S N] [IsScalarTower R S N]
890	    (gN : MS →ₗ[S] N)
891	    (Aloc : Type u) [CommRing Aloc] [Algebra S Aloc]
892	    [IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S a)) Aloc]
893	    [Module Aloc N] [IsScalarTower S Aloc N]
894	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S a)) gN]
895	    [Algebra R Aloc] [IsScalarTower R S Aloc] [IsScalarTower R Aloc N]
896	    [IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers a) Aloc] :
897	    IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) ((gN.restrictScalars R) ∘ₗ bc) := by
898	  have hg : IsBaseChange Aloc gN :=
899	    (isLocalizedModule_iff_isBaseChange (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S a)) Aloc gN).mp
900	      inferInstance
901	  exact (isLocalizedModule_iff_isBaseChange (Submonoid.powers a) Aloc _).mpr (hbc.comp hg)
902	
903	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — the un-localised section Čech module complex `D•`
904	
905	`D^m` is the product `∏_{σ : Fin m → ι} M_{s_σ}` of away-localisations of
906	`M = Γ(Spec R, F)` at the multi-index products `s_σ = ∏ₖ s_{σ k}`; its differential
907	is the alternating sum of the canonical localisation comparison maps (index deletion
908	drops a factor, so `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`).  This is the concrete `R`-module complex `D•`
909	of `lem:section_cech_homology_exact` that the section Čech complex is identified
910	with.  Positive-degree exactness is reduced — via `exact_of_isLocalized_span` — to
911	the localised complexes already shown exact in `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`;
912	the bridge is the localisation-transitivity lemma
913	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule` (applied here as
914	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/
915	
916	namespace SectionCechModule
917	
918	open CechLocalized AwayComparison
919	
920	variable {R : Type u} [CommRing R] {ι : Type*} (s : ι → R)
921	variable (M : Type u) [AddCommGroup M] [Module R M]
922	
923	/-- The un-localised section Čech coefficient `D_σ = M_{s_σ}`. -/
924	abbrev dCoeff {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : Type u :=

text: Now let's read the key `dDiff`, `dDiff_exact`, `dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway`, `dDiff_exact_of_affineCover` in full.

data.content:
924	abbrev dCoeff {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) : Type u :=
925	  LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M
926	
927	/-- The un-localised coface comparison `δ : M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}} → M_{s_σ}` (R-linear), the
928	canonical localisation map for the divisibility `s_{σ∘dⱼ} ∣ s_σ`. -/
929	noncomputable def dCoface (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
930	    dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
931	  comparison
932	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
933	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
934	    (Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
935	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M))
936	
937	/-- The un-localised differential `d : D^m → D^{m+1}` as an `R`-linear map: the
938	alternating sum of cofaces, assembled with `LinearMap.pi` over the output tuple. -/
939	noncomputable def dDiff (m : ℕ) :
940	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :=
941	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
942	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (dCoface s M m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
943	
944	/-- Apply form of `dDiff`: the alternating sum of cofaces of the deleted faces. -/
945	lemma dDiff_apply (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
946	    dDiff s M m t σ
947	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • dCoface s M m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
948	  rw [dDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
949	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
950	
951	variable (r : ι)
952	
953	/-- The per-index localisation comparison `M_{s_σ} → M_{s_r · s_σ}` carrying the
954	un-localised coefficient to the `cechCoeff` coefficient localised at `s_r`. -/
955	noncomputable def dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
956	    dCoeff s M σ →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
957	  comparison
958	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)
959	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
960	    (Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r))
961	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
962	
963	/-- **Transitivity payoff**: `dToCech` exhibits the localised coefficient
964	`cechCoeff = M_{s_r · s_σ}` as the localisation of the un-localised coefficient
965	`M_{s_σ}` away from the spanning element `s_r`.  Direct from
966	`AwayComparison.comparison_isLocalizedModule`; this is the per-coefficient input the
967	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction of the section Čech complex consumes. -/
968	lemma dToCech_isLocalizedModule {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin m → ι) :
969	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (dToCech s M r σ) := by
970	  haveI inst : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ * s r))
971	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M) := by
972	    rw [mul_comm]; infer_instance
973	  unfold dToCech
974	  exact comparison_isLocalizedModule (a := sprod s σ) (b := s r) _ _ _
975	
976	/-- **Per-coface localisation naturality**: the localised coface `cechCoface`
977	intertwines the per-index comparison `dToCech` with the un-localised coface
978	`dCoface`.  Both composites are away-comparison maps from `M_{s_{σ∘dⱼ}}` to
979	`M_{s_r · s_σ}`, hence equal by `comparison_comp`.  This is the square that, summed
980	over the alternating signs, identifies the localised differential
981	`IsLocalizedModule.map (dDiff)` with `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` —
982	the final brick of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span` reduction. -/
983	lemma cechCoface_dToCech {m : ℕ} (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
984	    (x : dCoeff s M (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
985	    cechCoface s M r m σ j (dToCech s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) x)
986	      = dToCech s M r σ (dCoface s M m σ j x) := by
987	  simp only [cechCoface, dToCech, dCoface, LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
988	  rw [comparison_comp_apply, comparison_comp_apply]
989	  exact Inverts.of_dvd (dvd_trans (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j) (dvd_mul_left (sprod s σ) (s r)))
990	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
991	
992	/-- **Differential-naturality square** (the heart of the `exact_of_isLocalized_span`
993	reduction): localising the un-localised differential `dDiff` at a spanning element
994	`s_r` — via the per-index comparisons `dToCech` — yields the localised differential
995	`CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)`.  Summing the per-coface squares
996	`cechCoface_dToCech` over the alternating signs.  Combined with
997	`dToCech_isLocalizedModule`, `IsLocalizedModule.pi`, and the uniqueness of
998	`IsLocalizedModule.map`, this identifies the localised `dDiff` with the
999	exact complex `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1000	lemma dToCech_comm (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
1001	    CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
1002	        (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ))
1003	      = fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (dDiff s M m t σ) := by
1004	  funext σ
1005	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1006	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => ?_
1007	  rw [map_zsmul, cechCoface_dToCech]
1008	
1009	/-! ### Assembly of step (a): positive-degree exactness of `D•`
1010	
1011	The localised differential at a fixed index `r`, bundled as an `R`-linear map
1012	(`locDiff`), so that `IsLocalizedModule.map` uniqueness identifies it with the
1013	localisation of `dDiff`.  Everything here is at a *fixed* index `r : ι` (no
1014	`Classical.choose`), hence friction-free; the spanning-element bookkeeping is
1015	confined to the final `dDiff_exact`. -/
1016	
1017	/-- R-linear underlying map of the localised coface `cechCoface` (the `comparison`
1018	before `.toAddMonoidHom`). -/
1019	noncomputable def cechCofaceLin (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1)) :
1020	    cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove) →ₗ[R] cechCoeff s M r σ :=
1021	  comparison
1022	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) M)
1023	    (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M)
1024	    (Inverts.of_dvd (mul_dvd_mul_left (s r) (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j))
1025	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (s r * sprod s σ)) M))
1026	
1027	lemma cechCoface_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) (j : Fin (m + 1))
1028	    (x : cechCoeff s M r (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) :
1029	    cechCoface s M r m σ j x = cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j x := rfl
1030	
1031	/-- The localised section Čech differential at index `r`, as a bundled `R`-linear
1032	map (mirrors `dDiff` with the localised cofaces). -/
1033	noncomputable def locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1034	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1035	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1036	    (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • (cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj (σ ∘ j.succAbove))
1037	
1038	lemma locDiff_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ)
1039	    (σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι) :
1040	    locDiff s M r m t σ
1041	      = ∑ j : Fin (m + 1),
1042	          (-1 : ℤ) ^ (j : ℕ) • cechCofaceLin s M r m σ j (t (σ ∘ j.succAbove)) := by
1043	  rw [locDiff, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.sum_apply]
1044	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun d _ => rfl
1045	
1046	/-- `locDiff` agrees, as a raw function, with the localised combinatorial
1047	differential `CombinatorialCech.depDiff (cechCoface)` already shown exact. -/
1048	lemma locDiff_eq_depDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1049	    ⇑(locDiff s M r m)
1050	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ)
1051	          (cechCoface s M r) (m := m) := by
1052	  funext t σ
1053	  rw [locDiff_apply]
1054	  simp only [CombinatorialCech.depDiff]
1055	  exact Finset.sum_congr rfl fun j _ => by rw [cechCoface_apply]
1056	
1057	/-- Positive-degree exactness of the bundled localised differential, transported
1058	from `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`. -/
1059	lemma locDiff_exact (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1060	    Function.Exact (locDiff s M r (m + 1)) (locDiff s M r (m + 2)) := by
1061	  rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff, locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1062	  exact CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact s M r m
1063	
1064	/-- The product localisation map `D^m → ∏_σ M_{s_r·s_σ}` at index `r`. -/
1065	noncomputable def fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1066	    (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) →ₗ[R] (∀ σ : Fin m → ι, cechCoeff s M r σ) :=
1067	  LinearMap.pi fun σ => dToCech s M r σ ∘ₗ LinearMap.proj σ
1068	
1069	lemma fLoc_apply (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) (σ : Fin m → ι) :
1070	    fLoc s M r m t σ = dToCech s M r σ (t σ) := by
1071	  simp only [fLoc, LinearMap.pi_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.proj_apply]
1072	
1073	/-- `fLoc` exhibits the product localised coefficient as the localisation of `D^m`
1074	away from `s_r` (from `IsLocalizedModule.pi` + `dToCech_isLocalizedModule`). -/
1075	instance fLoc_isLocalizedModule [Finite ι] (r : ι) (m : ℕ) :
1076	    IsLocalizedModule.Away (s r) (fLoc s M r m) := by
1077	  haveI : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (s r)) (dToCech s M r σ) :=
1078	    fun σ => dToCech_isLocalizedModule s M r σ
1079	  exact IsLocalizedModule.pi (Submonoid.powers (s r)) fun σ => dToCech s M r σ
1080	
1081	/-- The localised differential intertwines `fLoc` with `dDiff` (the `dToCech_comm`
1082	square, packaged through the bundled maps). -/
1083	lemma locDiff_fLoc (r : ι) (m : ℕ) (t : ∀ σ : Fin m → ι, dCoeff s M σ) :
1084	    locDiff s M r m (fLoc s M r m t) = fLoc s M r (m + 1) (dDiff s M m t) := by
1085	  have h1 : ⇑(locDiff s M r m) (fLoc s M r m t)
1086	      = CombinatorialCech.depDiff (A := fun _ σ => cechCoeff s M r σ) (cechCoface s M r) (m := m)
1087	          (fun σ => dToCech s M r σ (t σ)) := by
1088	    rw [locDiff_eq_depDiff]
1089	    exact congrArg _ (funext fun σ => fLoc_apply s M r m t σ)
1090	  rw [h1, dToCech_comm]
1091	  funext σ
1092	  exact (fLoc_apply s M r (m + 1) (dDiff s M m t) σ).symm
1093	
1094	/-- `IsLocalizedModule.map` of `dDiff` is the bundled localised differential
1095	`locDiff` — by `IsLocalizedModule.ext`, the comparison reducing to `locDiff_fLoc`.
1096	Stated for an arbitrary away element `a` (with `s r = a`) so the spanning-element
1097	bookkeeping in `dDiff_exact` needs no `↑ρ`-rewrite inside the localised map. -/
1098	lemma map_dDiff_eq_locDiff (r : ι) (m : ℕ) {a : R}
1099	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m)]
1100	    [IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r (m + 1))] :
1101	    IsLocalizedModule.map (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m) (fLoc s M r (m + 1))
1102	        (dDiff s M m) = locDiff s M r m := by
1103	  apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers a) (fLoc s M r m)
1104	    (fun x => IsLocalizedModule.map_units (fLoc s M r (m + 1)) x)
1105	  apply LinearMap.ext; intro t
1106	  rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, IsLocalizedModule.map_apply, locDiff_fLoc]
1107	
1108	/-- A chosen `ι`-index realising a spanning-set element as `s i`, kept opaque so
1109	the spanning-element rewrite in `dDiff_exact` has a type-correct motive (the index
1110	must not syntactically contain `↑ρ`). -/
1111	private noncomputable def spanIdx (ρ : ↑(Set.range s)) : ι := ρ.2.choose
1112	
1113	omit [CommRing R] in
1114	private lemma spanIdx_spec (ρ : ↑(Set.range s)) : s (spanIdx s ρ) = ↑ρ := ρ.2.choose_spec
1115	
1116	/-- **Step (a): positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module
1117	complex `D•`** (`lem:cech_acyclic_affine`, the `R`-module core).  For a spanning
1118	family `s : ι → R` (`Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤`), the complex
1119	`∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is exact in positive degrees.  Reduced — via
1120	`exact_of_isLocalized_span` localising at each spanning element `s_r` — to the
1121	exactness `locDiff_exact` of the localised complexes (which is the dependent
1122	combinatorial core `CechLocalized.cechLocalized_exact`), through the localised-
1123	differential identification `map_dDiff_eq_locDiff`. -/
1124	lemma dDiff_exact [Finite ι] (hs : Ideal.span (Set.range s) = ⊤) (m : ℕ) :
1125	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1126	  classical
1127	  haveI inst1 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1128	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1)) := fun ρ => by
1129	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1130	  haveI inst2 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1131	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2)) := fun ρ => by
1132	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1133	  haveI inst3 : ∀ ρ : ↑(Set.range s),
1134	      IsLocalizedModule.Away (↑ρ) (fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 3)) := fun ρ => by
1135	    rw [← spanIdx_spec s ρ]; infer_instance
1136	  refine exact_of_isLocalized_span (Set.range s) hs
1137	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 1) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1138	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1))
1139	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 2) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1140	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2))
1141	    (fun ρ => ∀ σ : Fin (m + 3) → ι, cechCoeff s M (spanIdx s ρ) σ)
1142	    (fun ρ => fLoc s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 3))
1143	    (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) fun ρ => ?_
1144	  rw [map_dDiff_eq_locDiff s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 1),
1145	    map_dDiff_eq_locDiff s M (spanIdx s ρ) (m + 2)]
1146	  exact locDiff_exact s M (spanIdx s ρ) m
1147	
1148	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
1149	set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
1150	-- raised: the change-of-ring ladder repeatedly synthesises `AddMonoidHomClass` over the
1151	-- `dCoeff`-abbreviated `LocalizedModule` carriers, which is instance-search heavy.
1152	set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000 in
1153	/-- **Route-B positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module complex
1154	`D•` over a standard *sub*cover of `D(f)`** (`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_tilde_subcover`,
1155	module core).  Here `s = g` need NOT span the unit ideal of `R`; only its image `s/1`
1156	spans the unit ideal of the away ring `R_f` (`hspan`), and each `s i` lies in `√(f)`
1157	(`hmem`).  The complex `∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is then exact in positive degrees.
1158	
1159	Route B (change-of-ring): instantiate `dDiff_exact` over `R_f = Localization.Away f` with
1160	the module `M_f = LocalizedModule (powers f) M` and the spanning family `s/1`, then transport
1161	the resulting positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise additive
1162	isomorphisms `M_{s_σ} ≅ (M_f)_{s_σ}` (`AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away` + the
1163	universal `IsLocalizedModule.iso`), which intertwine the alternating-sum localisation
1164	differentials. -/
1165	lemma dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway [Finite ι] (f : R)
1166	    (hmem : ∀ i, ∃ k, f ∣ s i ^ k)
1167	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R (Localization.Away f) (s i))) = ⊤)
1168	    (m : ℕ) :
1169	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1170	  classical
1171	  set Rf := Localization.Away f with hRf
1172	  set Mf := LocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers f) M with hMf
1173	  set g' : ι → Rf := fun i => algebraMap R Rf (s i) with hg'
1174	  -- `R_f`-side positive-degree exactness (the black-box reuse of `dDiff_exact`).
1175	  have Hf : Function.Exact (dDiff g' Mf (m + 1)) (dDiff g' Mf (m + 2)) :=
1176	    dDiff_exact g' Mf hspan m
1177	  -- `sprod g' σ` is the image of `sprod s σ`.
1178	  have hsprod : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin n → ι), sprod g' σ = algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ) := by
1179	    intro n σ; simp only [g', sprod, map_prod]
1180	  -- per (nonempty) `σ`: `f` divides a power of `sprod s σ`.
1181	  have hdvd : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), ∃ k, f ∣ sprod s σ ^ k := by
1182	    intro n σ
1183	    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hmem (σ 0)
1184	    refine ⟨k, ?_⟩
1185	    have he : sprod s σ ^ k = s (σ 0) ^ k * (∏ x : Fin n, s (σ x.succ)) ^ k := by
1186	      rw [sprod, Fin.prod_univ_succ, mul_pow]
1187	    rw [he]; exact hk.mul_right _
1188	  -- the composite localisation structure map `M → M_f → (M_f)_{s_σ}` localises `M` at `s_σ`.
1189	  have inst_comp : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1190	      IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1191	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1192	          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M) := by
1193	    intro n σ
1194	    obtain ⟨k, h, hh⟩ := hdvd σ
1195	    haveI : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R Rf (sprod s σ)))
1196	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf) := by
1197	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1198	    exact AwayComparison.isLocalizedModule_comp_away f (sprod s σ) h hh
1199	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
1200	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
1201	  -- the per-σ `R`-linear comparison `(M_f)_{s_σ} ≅ M_{s_σ}` (Rf-side → R-side).
1202	  let eσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), dCoeff g' Mf σ ≃ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
1203	    fun {n} σ =>
1204	      haveI := inst_comp σ
1205	      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1206	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1207	          LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)).symm
1208	  -- `eσL τ` undoes the composite structure map: it sends `compMap τ mval ↦ mk_{s_τ} mval`.
1209	  have heσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (τ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) (mval : M),
1210	      eσL τ ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf)
1211	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
1212	        = LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ)) M mval := by
1213	    intro n τ mval
1214	    haveI := inst_comp τ
1215	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun (IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ))
1216	      ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' τ)) Mf).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1217	        LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)) mval
1218	  -- per-coface naturality: `eσ` intertwines the two cofaces.
1219	  have nat : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (n + 2))
1220	      (z : dCoeff g' Mf (σ ∘ j.succAbove)),
1221	      eσL σ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j z)
1222	        = dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) z) := by
1223	    intro n σ j z
1224	    haveI := inst_comp (σ ∘ j.succAbove)
1225	    -- reduce to elements `compMap (σ∘d) mval` by localisation extensionality
1226	    have key : (eσL σ).toLinearMap ∘ₗ (dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j).restrictScalars R
1227	        = (dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j) ∘ₗ (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove)).toLinearMap := by
1228	      apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove)))
1229	        (LinearMap.restrictScalars R
1230	            (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) Mf)
1231	          ∘ₗ LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M)
1232	        (fun x => (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
1233	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)).isUnit_powers x)
1234	      apply LinearMap.ext; intro mval
1235	      simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply,
1236	        LinearEquiv.coe_coe]
1237	      -- LHS
1238	      have hL : dCoface g' Mf (n + 1) σ j
1239	            ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) Mf)
1240	              (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval))
1241	          = (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod g' σ)) Mf)
1242	              (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers f) M mval) := by
1243	        simp only [dCoface]
1244	        exact AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ _
1245	      rw [hL, heσL σ mval, heσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) mval]
1246	      -- RHS
1247	      simp only [dCoface]
1248	      exact (AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ mval).symm
1249	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun key z
1250	  -- bundle the per-σ comparisons into product `AddEquiv`s.
1251	  let E : (n : ℕ) → ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff g' Mf σ) ≃+
1252	      ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff s M σ) :=
1253	    fun n => AddEquiv.piCongrRight (fun σ => (eσL σ).toAddEquiv)
1254	  -- the ladder squares.
1255	  have sq : ∀ r : ℕ,
1256	      (dDiff s M (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (E r).toAddMonoidHom
1257	        = (E (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (dDiff g' Mf (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom := by
1258	    intro r
1259	    apply AddMonoidHom.ext; intro x
1260	    simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
1261	      LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
1262	    funext σ
1263	    change dDiff s M (r + 1) (fun τ => eσL τ (x τ)) σ
1264	      = eσL σ (dDiff g' Mf (r + 1) x σ)
1265	    rw [dDiff_apply, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1266	    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun j _ => ?_)
1267	    rw [map_zsmul, nat]
1268	  exact Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact (E m) (E (m + 1)) (E (m + 2))
1269	    (sq m) (sq (m + 1)) Hf
1270	
1271	set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
1272	set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
1273	-- raised: like `dDiff_exact_of_localizationAway`, the change-of-ring ladder repeatedly synthesises
1274	-- `AddMonoidHomClass`/base-change instances over the `dCoeff`-abbreviated `LocalizedModule` carriers.
1275	set_option synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 800000 in
1276	/-- **Route-B1 positive-degree exactness of the un-localised section Čech module complex `D•` over a
1277	cover of a *general affine open* `V = ⨆ᵢ D(sᵢ)`** (`lem:affine_cech_vanishing_general_seed`, module
1278	core).  The cover family `s = g` need NOT span the unit ideal of `R`, and `V` need NOT be a single
1279	distinguished `D(f)`; only the images `sᵢ ↦ S = Γ(V)` span the unit ideal of `S` (`hspan`).  Then the
1280	complex `∏_σ M_{s_σ}` is exact in positive degrees.
1281	
1282	Route B1 (change of ring to `S = Γ(V)` via algebraic base change `M ⊗_R S`): instantiate `dDiff_exact`
1283	over `S` with the module `M_S = M ⊗_R S` and the spanning family `s̄ = algebraMap R S ∘ s`, then transport
1284	the resulting positive-degree exactness back to the `R`-side along the degreewise additive isomorphisms
1285	`M_{s_σ} ≅ (M_S)_{s̄_σ}` (`isLocalizedModule_baseChange_away` + the universal `IsLocalizedModule.iso`),
1286	which intertwine the alternating-sum localisation differentials.  The geometric input — that the
1287	localisation `(M_S)_{s̄_σ}`'s ring is simultaneously an `R`-localisation at `powers (s_σ)`, encoding
1288	`D(s_σ) ⊆ V` — is supplied per Čech multi-index `σ` by the `hloc` family (discharged at the wrapper
1289	from `IsAffineOpen V` via `IsAffineOpen.isLocalization_of_eq_basicOpen`). -/
1290	lemma dDiff_exact_of_affineCover [Finite ι]
1291	    (S : Type u) [CommRing S] [Algebra R S]
1292	    (hspan : Ideal.span (Set.range (fun i => algebraMap R S (s i))) = ⊤)
1293	    (hloc : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1294	      IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1295	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (sprod s σ)))))
1296	    (m : ℕ) :
1297	    Function.Exact (dDiff s M (m + 1)) (dDiff s M (m + 2)) := by
1298	  classical
1299	  set MS := TensorProduct R S M with hMS
1300	  set bc : M →ₗ[R] MS := TensorProduct.mk R S M 1 with hbc
1301	  set gS : ι → S := fun i => algebraMap R S (s i) with hgS
1302	  -- `S`-side positive-degree exactness (the black-box reuse of `dDiff_exact`).
1303	  have Hf : Function.Exact (dDiff gS MS (m + 1)) (dDiff gS MS (m + 2)) :=
1304	    dDiff_exact gS MS hspan m
1305	  -- `sprod gS σ` is the image of `sprod s σ`.
1306	  have hsprod : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin n → ι), sprod gS σ = algebraMap R S (sprod s σ) := by
1307	    intro n σ; simp only [hgS, sprod, map_prod]
1308	  -- the composite localisation structure map `M → M_S → (M_S)_{s_σ}` localises `M` at `s_σ`.
1309	  have inst_comp : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι),
1310	      IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1311	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ bc) := by
1312	    intro n σ
1313	    haveI hL : IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (sprod s σ)))
1314	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ))) := by
1315	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1316	    haveI hLM : IsLocalizedModule (Submonoid.powers (algebraMap R S (sprod s σ)))
1317	        (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS) := by
1318	      rw [← hsprod σ]; infer_instance
1319	    haveI hR : IsLocalization (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1320	        (Localization (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ))) := by
1321	      rw [hsprod σ]; exact hloc σ
1322	    exact isLocalizedModule_baseChange_away bc (TensorProduct.isBaseChange R M S)
1323	      (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS)
1324	      (Localization (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ))) (a := sprod s σ)
1325	  -- the per-σ `R`-linear comparison `(M_S)_{s_σ} ≅ M_{s_σ}` (S-side → R-side).
1326	  let eσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι), dCoeff gS MS σ ≃ₗ[R] dCoeff s M σ :=
1327	    fun {n} σ =>
1328	      haveI := inst_comp σ
1329	      (IsLocalizedModule.iso (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ))
1330	        ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1331	          bc)).symm
1332	  -- `eσL τ` undoes the composite structure map: it sends `compMap τ mval ↦ mk_{s_τ} mval`.
1333	  have heσL : ∀ {n : ℕ} (τ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) (mval : M),
1334	      eσL τ ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS τ)) MS) (bc mval))
1335	        = LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ)) M mval := by
1336	    intro n τ mval
1337	    haveI := inst_comp τ
1338	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun (IsLocalizedModule.iso_symm_comp (Submonoid.powers (sprod s τ))
1339	      ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS τ)) MS).restrictScalars R ∘ₗ
1340	        bc)) mval
1341	  -- per-coface naturality: `eσ` intertwines the two cofaces.
1342	  have nat : ∀ {n : ℕ} (σ : Fin (n + 2) → ι) (j : Fin (n + 2))
1343	      (z : dCoeff gS MS (σ ∘ j.succAbove)),
1344	      eσL σ (dCoface gS MS (n + 1) σ j z)
1345	        = dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) z) := by
1346	    intro n σ j z
1347	    haveI := inst_comp (σ ∘ j.succAbove)
1348	    have key : (eσL σ).toLinearMap ∘ₗ (dCoface gS MS (n + 1) σ j).restrictScalars R
1349	        = (dCoface s M (n + 1) σ j) ∘ₗ (eσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove)).toLinearMap := by
1350	      apply IsLocalizedModule.ext (Submonoid.powers (sprod s (σ ∘ j.succAbove)))
1351	        (LinearMap.restrictScalars R
1352	            (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) MS)
1353	          ∘ₗ bc)
1354	        (fun x => (AwayComparison.Inverts.of_dvd (sprod_succAbove_dvd s σ j)
1355	          (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)) M)).isUnit_powers x)
1356	      apply LinearMap.ext; intro mval
1357	      simp only [LinearMap.coe_comp, LinearMap.coe_restrictScalars, Function.comp_apply,
1358	        LinearEquiv.coe_coe]
1359	      have hL : dCoface gS MS (n + 1) σ j
1360	            ((LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS (σ ∘ j.succAbove))) MS)
1361	              (bc mval))
1362	          = (LocalizedModule.mkLinearMap (Submonoid.powers (sprod gS σ)) MS) (bc mval) := by
1363	        simp only [dCoface]
1364	        exact AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ _
1365	      rw [hL, heσL σ mval, heσL (σ ∘ j.succAbove) mval]
1366	      simp only [dCoface]
1367	      exact (AwayComparison.comparison_apply _ _ _ mval).symm
1368	    exact DFunLike.congr_fun key z
1369	  -- bundle the per-σ comparisons into product `AddEquiv`s.
1370	  let E : (n : ℕ) → ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff gS MS σ) ≃+
1371	      ((σ : Fin (n + 1) → ι) → dCoeff s M σ) :=
1372	    fun n => AddEquiv.piCongrRight (fun σ => (eσL σ).toAddEquiv)
1373	  -- the ladder squares.
1374	  have sq : ∀ r : ℕ,
1375	      (dDiff s M (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (E r).toAddMonoidHom
1376	        = (E (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom.comp (dDiff gS MS (r + 1)).toAddMonoidHom := by
1377	    intro r
1378	    apply AddMonoidHom.ext; intro x
1379	    simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply, AddEquiv.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
1380	      LinearMap.toAddMonoidHom_coe]
1381	    funext σ
1382	    change dDiff s M (r + 1) (fun τ => eσL τ (x τ)) σ
1383	      = eσL σ (dDiff gS MS (r + 1) x σ)
1384	    rw [dDiff_apply, dDiff_apply, map_sum]
1385	    refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun j _ => ?_)
1386	    rw [map_zsmul, nat]
1387	  exact Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact (E m) (E (m + 1)) (E (m + 2))
1388	    (sq m) (sq (m + 1)) Hf
1389

6	import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.CechBridge
7	import AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.AbsoluteCohomology
8	
9	/-!
10	# Čech-to-cohomology comparison on a basis (Stacks 01EO) — L1/L2 chain
11	
12	Project-local: builds the section-Čech short-exact-sequence (L1) and the
13	quotient-vanishing step (L2) of the 01EO dimension-shift argument.
14	-/
15	
16	universe u
17	
18	open CategoryTheory Limits CategoryTheory.Abelian
19	
20	namespace AlgebraicGeometry
21	
22	-- Re-activate the (file-local) `HasExt` instance from `AbsoluteCohomology.lean` so that the
23	-- `Ext`-based absolute cohomology resolves here without the slow `HasSmallLocalizedHom` search.
24	attribute [local instance] hasExtModules
25	
26	variable {X : Scheme.{u}}
27	
28	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — functoriality of the section Čech complex -/
29	
30	/-- The cosimplicial morphism of section Čech objects induced by a morphism `φ` of
31	presheaves of modules, acting coordinatewise by the underlying presheaf morphism on each
32	basic-open section group. Project-local: `sectionCechCosimplicial` has no functoriality in
33	Mathlib. -/
34	noncomputable def sectionCechCosimplicialMap {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
35	    {F G : X.PresheafOfModules} (φ : F ⟶ G) :
36	    sectionCechCosimplicial U F ⟶ sectionCechCosimplicial U G where
37	  app n := Limits.Pi.map (fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
38	    ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map φ).app (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))
39	  naturality {m n} f := by
40	    apply Limits.Pi.hom_ext
41	    intro σ
42	    simp only [sectionCechCosimplicial, Category.assoc, Limits.Pi.map_π, Limits.Pi.lift_π,
43	      Limits.Pi.map_π_assoc, Limits.Pi.lift_π_assoc]
44	    congr 1
45	    exact ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map φ).naturality _
46	
47	/-- The section Čech cosimplicial object as a functor in the coefficient presheaf of modules.
48	Project-local: packages `sectionCechCosimplicialMap` with functoriality so the induced
49	short-complex maps compose and respect zero. -/
50	noncomputable def sectionCechCosimplicialFunctor {ι : Type u}
51	    (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X) : X.PresheafOfModules ⥤ CosimplicialObject Ab.{u} where
52	  obj F := sectionCechCosimplicial U F
53	  map φ := sectionCechCosimplicialMap U φ
54	  map_id F := by
55	    apply NatTrans.ext
56	    funext n
57	    show (Limits.Pi.map fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
58	      ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map (𝟙 F)).app
59	        (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k)))) = 𝟙 _
60	    rw [show (fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
61	        ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map (𝟙 F)).app
62	          (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))
63	      = (fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
64	        𝟙 ((PresheafOfModules.presheaf F).obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))) from by
65	        funext σ; rw [CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id]; rfl]
66	    exact Limits.Pi.map_id
67	  map_comp φ ψ := by
68	    apply NatTrans.ext
69	    funext n
70	    show (Limits.Pi.map fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
71	      ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map (φ ≫ ψ)).app
72	        (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k)))) = _
73	    rw [show (fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
74	        ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map (φ ≫ ψ)).app
75	          (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))
76	      = (fun σ : Fin (n.len + 1) → ι =>
77	        ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map φ).app (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))) ≫
78	          ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map ψ).app
79	            (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k)))) from by funext σ; rw [CategoryTheory.Functor.map_comp]; rfl]
80	    exact (Limits.Pi.map_comp_map _ _).symm
81	
82	/-- The section Čech cochain complex as a functor in the coefficient presheaf of modules.
83	Project-local: functoriality of `sectionCechComplex`, used to form the short exact sequence of
84	Čech complexes. -/
85	noncomputable def sectionCechComplexFunctor {ι : Type u}
86	    (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X) : X.PresheafOfModules ⥤ CochainComplex Ab.{u} ℕ :=
87	  sectionCechCosimplicialFunctor U ⋙ AlgebraicTopology.alternatingCofaceMapComplex Ab.{u}
88	
89	/-- The chain map of section Čech complexes induced by a morphism `φ` of presheaves of
90	modules. Project-local: functoriality of `sectionCechComplex` in the coefficient presheaf. -/
91	noncomputable def sectionCechComplexMap {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
92	    {F G : X.PresheafOfModules} (φ : F ⟶ G) :
93	    sectionCechComplex U F ⟶ sectionCechComplex U G :=
94	  (AlgebraicTopology.alternatingCofaceMapComplex Ab.{u}).map (sectionCechCosimplicialMap U φ)
95	
96	/-- **{\v C}ech cohomology accessor** `Ȟ^p(𝒰, F)`: the degree-`p` homology of the section
97	Čech complex, packaged as a named `Ab`-object. Project-local thin wrapper so the 01EO chain
98	can refer to `Ȟ^p` uniformly. -/
99	noncomputable def cechCohomology {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
100	    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (p : ℕ) : Ab.{u} :=
101	  (sectionCechComplex U F).homology p
102	
103	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — product of short exact sequences in `Ab` -/
104	
105	private lemma pi_π_map_apply {J : Type u} {f g : J → Ab.{u}} (φ : ∀ j, f j ⟶ g j)
106	    (x : ToType (∏ᶜ f)) (σ : J) :
107	    Limits.Pi.π g σ (Limits.Pi.map φ x) = φ σ (Limits.Pi.π f σ x) := by
108	  rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply, Limits.Pi.map_π, ConcreteCategory.comp_apply]
109	
110	/-- **A product of short exact sequences of abelian groups is short exact.** This is the AB4*
111	content used in the section Čech short-exact-sequence: each Čech term is a product of section
112	groups over basic opens, so degreewise short-exactness of the Čech complexes reduces to this.
113	Project-local: Mathlib has no off-the-shelf "product of short exact sequences" lemma. -/
114	theorem shortExact_piMap {J : Type u} (S : J → ShortComplex Ab.{u}) (h : ∀ j, (S j).ShortExact) :
115	    (ShortComplex.mk (Limits.Pi.map (fun j => (S j).f)) (Limits.Pi.map (fun j => (S j).g))
116	      (by rw [Limits.Pi.map_comp_map]
117	          have hz : (fun j => (S j).f ≫ (S j).g) = (fun j => (0 : (S j).X₁ ⟶ (S j).X₃)) := by
118	            funext j; exact (S j).zero
119	          rw [hz]; ext x; simp)).ShortExact := by
120	  haveI : ∀ j, Mono (S j).f := fun j => (h j).mono_f
121	  -- Epi of the product map: surjectivity, chosen componentwise
122	  have hepi : Epi (Limits.Pi.map (fun j => (S j).g)) := by
123	    rw [AddCommGrpCat.epi_iff_surjective]
124	    intro y
125	    refine ⟨(Concrete.productEquiv (fun j => (S j).X₂)).symm
126	      (fun σ => ((h σ).ab_surjective_g (Limits.Pi.π (fun j => (S j).X₃) σ y)).choose), ?_⟩
127	    refine (Concrete.productEquiv (fun j => (S j).X₃)).injective (funext fun σ => ?_)
128	    rw [Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply, Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply,
129	      pi_π_map_apply, Concrete.productEquiv_symm_apply_π]
130	    exact ((h σ).ab_surjective_g (Limits.Pi.π (fun j => (S j).X₃) σ y)).choose_spec
131	  haveI := hepi
132	  haveI hmono : Mono (Limits.Pi.map (fun j => (S j).f)) := inferInstance
133	  refine ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk ?_
134	  rw [ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact]
135	  show Function.Exact (Limits.Pi.map (fun j => (S j).f)) (Limits.Pi.map (fun j => (S j).g))
136	  intro x
137	  constructor
138	  · intro hx
139	    have hcomp : ∀ σ, (S σ).g (Limits.Pi.π (fun j => (S j).X₂) σ x) = 0 := by
140	      intro σ
141	      have := congrArg (Limits.Pi.π (fun j => (S j).X₃) σ) hx
142	      rwa [pi_π_map_apply, map_zero] at this
143	    choose w hw using fun σ => (((ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact (S σ)).mp
144	      (h σ).exact (Limits.Pi.π (fun j => (S j).X₂) σ x)).mp
145	      (hcomp σ) : Limits.Pi.π (fun j => (S j).X₂) σ x ∈ Set.range (S σ).f)
146	    refine ⟨(Concrete.productEquiv (fun j => (S j).X₁)).symm w, ?_⟩
147	    refine (Concrete.productEquiv (fun j => (S j).X₂)).injective (funext fun σ => ?_)
148	    rw [Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply, Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply,
149	      pi_π_map_apply, Concrete.productEquiv_symm_apply_π]
150	    exact hw σ
151	  · rintro ⟨w, rfl⟩
152	    rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply, Limits.Pi.map_comp_map]
153	    have hz : (fun j => (S j).f ≫ (S j).g) = (fun j => (0 : (S j).X₁ ⟶ (S j).X₃)) := by
154	      funext j; exact (S j).zero
155	    rw [hz, show (Limits.Pi.map fun j => (0 : (S j).X₁ ⟶ (S j).X₃)) = 0 from by ext z; simp]
156	    rfl

158	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — L1 short exact sequence of section Čech complexes -/
159	
160	/-- The degree-`p`, index-`σ` term short complex of section groups over the basic open
161	`⨅ₖ U(σ k)` induced by a short complex `P` of presheaves of modules. Project-local: the
162	building block of the section Čech short exact sequence. -/
163	noncomputable def faceShortComplex {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
164	    (P : ShortComplex X.PresheafOfModules) {p : ℕ} (σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι) : ShortComplex Ab.{u} :=
165	  ShortComplex.mk
166	    (((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map P.f).app (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))
167	    (((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj).map P.g).app (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))
168	    (by rw [← NatTrans.comp_app, ← CategoryTheory.Functor.map_comp, P.zero,
169	          CategoryTheory.Functor.map_zero]; rfl)
170	
171	/-- The short complex of section Čech cochain complexes `0 → Č(F) → Č(I) → Č(Q) → 0` induced by
172	a short complex `P : 0 → F → I → Q → 0` of presheaves of modules. Project-local: Mathlib has no
173	section Čech complex, hence no short complex of them. -/
174	noncomputable def sectionCechComplexShortComplex {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
175	    (P : ShortComplex X.PresheafOfModules) : ShortComplex (CochainComplex Ab.{u} ℕ) :=
176	  ShortComplex.mk (sectionCechComplexMap U P.f) (sectionCechComplexMap U P.g) (by
177	    apply HomologicalComplex.hom_ext
178	    intro i
179	    rw [HomologicalComplex.comp_f, HomologicalComplex.zero_f]
180	    show (Limits.Pi.map fun σ : Fin (i + 1) → ι =>
181	        (faceShortComplex U P σ).f) ≫ (Limits.Pi.map fun σ : Fin (i + 1) → ι =>
182	        (faceShortComplex U P σ).g) = 0
183	    rw [Limits.Pi.map_comp_map,
184	      show (fun σ : Fin (i + 1) → ι => (faceShortComplex U P σ).f ≫ (faceShortComplex U P σ).g)
185	        = (fun σ : Fin (i + 1) → ι => (0 : (faceShortComplex U P σ).X₁ ⟶
186	            (faceShortComplex U P σ).X₃)) from by funext σ; exact (faceShortComplex U P σ).zero,
187	      show (Limits.Pi.map fun σ : Fin (i + 1) → ι => (0 : (faceShortComplex U P σ).X₁ ⟶
188	          (faceShortComplex U P σ).X₃)) = 0 from by ext z; simp])
189	
190	/-- **Short exact sequence of section Čech complexes from a basis (Stacks 01EO L1).** Given a
191	short complex `P` of presheaves of modules whose section sequences over every basic open
192	`⨅ₖ U(σ k)` are short exact (left-exactness from the sheaf sequence plus the basis surjectivity
193	of `ses_cech_h1`), the induced section Čech complexes form a short exact sequence. Project-local:
194	this is the term-wise-product step of the 01EO proof; degreewise it is a product of the
195	basic-open section short exact sequences. -/
196	theorem cechComplex_shortExact_of_basis {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
197	    (P : ShortComplex X.PresheafOfModules)
198	    (hface : ∀ (p : ℕ) (σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι), (faceShortComplex U P σ).ShortExact) :
199	    (sectionCechComplexShortComplex U P).ShortExact := by
200	  apply HomologicalComplex.shortExact_of_degreewise_shortExact
201	  intro i
202	  exact shortExact_piMap (fun σ : Fin (i + 1) → ι => faceShortComplex U P σ) (hface i)
203	
204	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — L2 homological core (quotient vanishing) -/
205	
206	/-- **Quotient preserves vanishing higher cohomology (homological core, Stacks 01EO L2).**
207	Given a short exact sequence of cochain complexes `0 → X₁ → X₂ → X₃ → 0` in which the middle
208	term `X₂` has vanishing positive homology (the injective/acyclic term) and the left term `X₁`
209	has vanishing positive homology (condition (3)), the right term `X₃` (the quotient) again has
210	vanishing positive homology. Proved by the homology long exact sequence: the connecting map
211	gives `Hᵖ(X₃) ≅ Hᵖ⁺¹(X₁) = 0`. Project-local: the 01EO dimension-shift needs this abstract
212	shape; it is then instantiated at the section Čech complexes. -/
213	theorem cechHomology_quotient_vanishing (T : ShortComplex (CochainComplex Ab.{u} ℕ))
214	    (hT : T.ShortExact) (hI : ∀ p, 0 < p → IsZero (T.X₂.homology p))
215	    (hF : ∀ p, 0 < p → IsZero (T.X₁.homology p)) :
216	    ∀ p, 0 < p → IsZero (T.X₃.homology p) := by
217	  intro p hp
218	  have hrel : (ComplexShape.up ℕ).Rel p (p + 1) := rfl
219	  have hiso : T.X₃.homology p ≅ T.X₁.homology (p + 1) :=
220	    hT.δIso p (p + 1) hrel (hI p hp) (hI (p + 1) (Nat.succ_pos p))
221	  exact (hF (p + 1) (Nat.succ_pos p)).of_iso hiso
222	
223	/-- **Quotient preserves vanishing higher Čech cohomology (Stacks 01EO L2).** Concrete form in
224	terms of `cechCohomology`: with the section Čech short exact sequence of `P` (from L1), if the
225	middle term `I` (injective/acyclic, condition from `injective_cech_acyclic`) and the left term
226	`F` (condition (3)) both have vanishing positive Čech cohomology, then so does the quotient `Q`.
227	Project-local: instantiates `cechHomology_quotient_vanishing` at the section Čech complexes. -/
228	theorem quotient_cech_vanishing_of_basis {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
229	    (P : ShortComplex X.PresheafOfModules)
230	    (hSES : (sectionCechComplexShortComplex U P).ShortExact)
231	    (hI : ∀ p, 0 < p → IsZero (cechCohomology U P.X₂ p))
232	    (hF : ∀ p, 0 < p → IsZero (cechCohomology U P.X₁ p)) :
233	    ∀ p, 0 < p → IsZero (cechCohomology U P.X₃ p) :=
234	  cechHomology_quotient_vanishing (sectionCechComplexShortComplex U P) hSES hI hF
235	
236	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — per-face short exact sequence (01EO) -/
237	
238	/-- The sections functor `Γ(V, -) : X.Modules ⥤ Ab` over a fixed open `V`, as the composite of
239	the inclusion of sheaves of modules into presheaves of modules, the forgetful to presheaves of
240	abelian groups, and evaluation at `V`. Project-local: used only to package the left-exactness of
241	sections (each factor preserves finite limits) for the per-face short exact sequence. -/
242	noncomputable def sectionsFunctor (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens X) : X.Modules ⥤ Ab.{u} :=
243	  Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X ⋙ PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf X.ringCatSheaf.obj ⋙
244	    (CategoryTheory.evaluation _ _).obj (Opposite.op V)
245	
246	/-- **Per-face short exact sequence from a sheaf short exact sequence (Stacks 01EO).** Given a
247	short exact sequence `S : 0 → F → I → Q → 0` of sheaves of `O_X`-modules and the assumption that
248	on every face `V_σ = ⨅ₖ U(σ k)` the section map `I(V_σ) → Q(V_σ)` is surjective, the per-face
249	short complex `faceShortComplex U (S.map toPresheafOfModules) σ` is short exact. Mono and middle
250	exactness come from left-exactness of the sections functor (`sectionsFunctor` preserves finite
251	limits); the epi is the surjectivity hypothesis (supplied downstream by `ses_cech_h1`).
252	Project-local: produces the per-face hypothesis consumed by `cechComplex_shortExact_of_basis`. -/
253	theorem faceShortComplex_shortExact_of_sheaf_ses {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
254	    (S : ShortComplex X.Modules) (hS : S.ShortExact)
255	    (hsurj : ∀ (p : ℕ) (σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι), Function.Surjective (ConcreteCategory.hom
256	      (faceShortComplex U (S.map (Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X)) σ).g))
257	    (p : ℕ) (σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι) :
258	    (faceShortComplex U (S.map (Scheme.Modules.toPresheafOfModules X)) σ).ShortExact := by
259	  haveI hpzm : (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k))).PreservesZeroMorphisms := by
260	    unfold sectionsFunctor; infer_instance
261	  haveI hpfl : PreservesFiniteLimits (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k))) := by
262	    unfold sectionsFunctor; infer_instance
263	  haveI : Mono S.f := hS.mono_f
264	  change (S.map (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k)))).ShortExact
265	  have hex : (S.map (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k)))).Exact :=
266	    ShortComplex.Exact.map_of_mono_of_preservesKernel hS.exact
267	      (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k))) hS.mono_f inferInstance
268	  haveI : Mono (S.map (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k)))).f :=
269	    inferInstanceAs (Mono ((sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k))).map S.f))
270	  haveI : Epi (S.map (sectionsFunctor (⨅ k, U (σ k)))).g := by
271	    rw [AddCommGrpCat.epi_iff_surjective]
272	    exact hsurj p σ
273	  exact ShortComplex.ShortExact.mk hex
